metadata.description: The Dataverse Instance to connect to within a Flow when using Web API Calls

text_1.title: Template GUID
text_1.description: The GUID of the created Template

text_2.title: Parent Node Linenumber
text_2.description: The Line Number of the selected Calculation Position

boolean.description: Define whether a BOM Project Product is used for Template Positions or not
boolean.title: Is BOM

text_3.description: The GUID of the created BOM Project Product for the Template
text_3.title: BOM Project Product GUID

text_4.description: The GUID of the Processing Log
text_4.title: Processing Log GUID

boolean_1.description: Use Placeholder Template BOM Project Product created in Parent Flow or create Template BOM Project Products as defined in Calculation
boolean_1.title: Use Placeholder BOM

select.Message: @coalesce(item()?['outputs']?['body']?['error']?['message'], item()?['outputs']?['body']?['message'], item()?['error']?['message'], 'No Message found. Please check Flow-Run.')

select.hso_billofmaterial_projectproductid@odat:
@If(
    equals(triggerBody()?['boolean_1'],false),
    If(
        empty(item()?['_hso_billofmaterial_projectproductid_value']),
        '', 
        concat(
            'hso_projectproducts(_hso_templateid_value=', 
            triggerBody()['text_1'], 
            ', hso_name=', 
            concat('''', replace(replace(item()?['_hso_billofmaterial_projectproductid_value@OData.Community.Display.V1.FormattedValue'], '/', ' '), '\', ' '), ''''), 
            ')'
        )
    ),
    If(
        and(
            equals(triggerBody()?['boolean'],true),
            or(
                equals(item()?['hso_positionelementtype'],100000000),
                equals(item()?['hso_positionelementtype'],100000002),
                equals(item()?['hso_positionelementtype'],100000003)
            )
        ),
        concat(
            'hso_projectproducts(',
            triggerBody()?['text_3'],
            ')'
        ),
        ''
    )
)
select.hso_templatedetail_parentid@odata.bind:
@if(
  or(
    empty(item()?['_hso_calculationdetail_parentid_value']),
    equals(item()?['hso_linenumber'], triggerBody()?['text_2'])
  ), 
  '', 
  concat(
    'hso_templatedetails(_hso_templateid_value=', 
    triggerBody()?['text_1'],
    ', hso_linenumber=', 
    concat(
      '''', 
      item()?['hso_calculationdetail_parentid_linenumber'], 
      ''''
    ),
    ')'
  )
)

parameters.fetchXml:
<fetch version="1.0" output-format="xml-platform" mapping="logical" returntotalrecordcount="true" distinct="true">
  <entity name="hso_calculationdetail">
    <attribute name="hso_calculationdetailid" />
    <attribute name="hso_name" />
    <attribute name="hso_linenumber" />
    <attribute name="hso_sortinglinenumber" />
    <attribute name="hso_level" />
    <attribute name="hso_calculationid" />

    <filter>
      <condition attribute="hso_calculationid" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()?['text']}" />
    </filter>

    <!-- Only include records that have related Annotations (isdocument = true) -->
    <link-entity name="annotation" from="objectid" to="hso_calculationdetailid" link-type="inner" alias="a">
      <attribute name="annotationid" />
      <attribute name="filename" />
      <filter>
        <condition attribute="isdocument" operator="eq" value="1" />
      </filter>
    </link-entity>

    <!-- Optional sorting -->
    <order attribute="hso_sortinglinenumber" descending="false" />
  </entity>
</fetch>

Filter_Positions_by_Project_Product.description: Get all Positions of Type 'Project Product'.

Remove_Project_Products_from_Positions.description: Remove all Positions of Type 'Project Product' - these Positions are already added to the Payload in the previous step

Set_varTemplateDetails_Payload.description: Add all Positions to Payload without replacing any Project Product GUID.

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - Process @{length(body('Filter_Payload_by_Level'))} Level-@{variables('varIterationLevel')} Items with @{outputs('Calculate_Parallelism')} Batch(es) (Batch Size: @{outputs('Calculate_Batch_Size')}). @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

select.Message: @coalesce(item()?['outputs']?['body']?['error']?['message'], item()?['outputs']?['body']?['message'], item()?['error']?['message'], 'No Message found. Please check Flow-Run.')

inputs.name: varLog
varLog
varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'HH:mm:ss')}] -  No BOM Project Products to create. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

select.Message: @coalesce(item()?['outputs']?['body']?['error']?['message'], item()?['outputs']?['body']?['message'], item()?['error']?['message'], 'No Message found. Please check Flow-Run.')

inputs.name: varErrorMessage
inputs.value: [ERROR] - Action '@{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Action']}' failed with error message: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Message']} (Status: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Status']} / Status Code: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['StatusCode']})

Re-Numerate_Template_Positions.description: Trigger Custom API to re-numerate the created Template Positions to ensure that the highest Template Node starts with Linenumber 1 on Level 1
